inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible ARIA name of the component.

inputs.name: hideDragOverlay
inputs.description:
By default there will be drag and drop overlay shown over the `ui5-upload-collection` when files
are dragged. If you don't intend to use drag and drop, set this property.

*Note:** It is up to the application developer to add handler for `drop` event and handle it.
`ui5-upload-collection` only displays an overlay.

inputs.name: noDataDescription
inputs.description: Allows you to set your own text for the 'No data' description.

inputs.name: noDataHeaderLevel
inputs.description: Defines the header level of the 'No data' text.

inputs.name: noDataText
inputs.description: Allows you to set your own text for the 'No data' text.

inputs.name: selectionMode
inputs.description: Defines the selection mode of the `ui5-upload-collection`.

outputs.name: ui5ItemDelete
outputs.description:
Fired when an element is dropped inside the drag and drop overlay.

*Note:** The `drop` event is fired only when elements are dropped within the drag and drop overlay and ignored for the other parts of the `ui5-upload-collection`.

outputs.name: ui5SelectionChange
outputs.description:
Fired when selection is changed by user interaction
in `Single` and `Multiple` modes.
